title: Pack Eligibility Simulator
description: Runs the composition resolver in preview mode: given a hypothetical market and selections, shows the effective configuration plan. Deterministic and stateless — no persistent mutation. Operator question: 'If I set up a tenant in market X with selections Y, what packs would resolve?' No VistA equivalent — platform-native composition preview surface.

dataSources.description: Composition resolver in preview mode: resolves effective configuration for hypothetical market and selection combinations.
